title: Build an Inventory Management System
description: Build a complete inventory management system from scratch, adding C++ features chapter by chapter. By the end, you'll have a program with product tracking, file storage, search/sort, and an OOP design with inheritance.
final_description: A complete inventory system with product structs, dynamic arrays, file persistence, search and sort algorithms, a class hierarchy with inheritance, templates, and exception handling — built across 10 chapters using progressively advanced C++ concepts.
